title: Aetheris Realm
description: Fun custom modpack for the residents of the Aetheris realm
body:
# **_A quality of life modpack for the residents of the Aetheris realm_**

This modpack was put together for a few friends on a private server, but is welcome to be used by anyone. It offers many optimization, quality of life, and cosmetic mods with a few fun ones as well. There's also a collection of curated resourcepacks to enhance the look of the game/gui.

This modpack must be installed in both the client and server from **_version 3.0.0_** and above. Anything before that can be used on public servers and realms. However, do keep in mind that some mods could be considered cheating such as the bridging mod, no mining cooldown, and item swapper. They can be disabled through the configs, but keep in mind to turn them off on servers/realms that don't allow it or it could get you banned from said server/realm.

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

_As of version 2.0.0, this modpack has now become a fork of "Fabulously Optimized" in order to make sure this modpack has been properly optimized_
